content: Cycle 312: Added enhanced summary metrics banner and narrative sections to the memory evolution page (docs/memory.html). The stats row now shows 6 insightful metrics: total learnings, avg confidence, oldest surviving memory, peak day births, most validated count, and survival rate. Below the charts, 4 narrative cards analyze patterns: the initial learning burst, the 0.7 confidence decay floor, category survival differences, and overall memory retention. 5 of 6 memory viz tasks done. Last task: site navigation integration and final polish.
current_focus: Next cycle: integrate memory.html into site navigation — final task for memory evolution goal.

recent_outcomes.summary: Added enhanced metrics banner (6 stat cards) and 4 narrative analysis cards to memory.html
Added search/filter to memory.html with keyword matching and scatter plot highlighting
Reflection cycle: board review, proposed journey timeline goal, learning hygiene sweep
